title: Stop Prompting Claude. Use Karpathy's Method Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese describes Andrej Karpathy's approach to using Claude, structured in three layers, which differs from standard prompting and enables faster development. The method is positioned as a more effective way to leverage Claude Code and Claude for building software applications in 2026.
